name: ai-agent-toolkit
description: Source-first AI-agent toolkit with native Claude Code plugin metadata and an opt-in local bridge for OpenCode and AG2 adapters.

interface.shortDescription: Source-first reusable agent skills with opt-in local bridge adapters
interface.longDescription: Use AI Agent Toolkit for reusable source-traceable skills, repo-local agent rules, validation guidance, and opt-in local OpenCode or AG2 bridge adapters. Claude Code updates this package natively and never installs or updates Codex.
defaultPrompt: Audit the local Toolkit bridge state.
Set up the AG2 bridge after showing me the planned writes.
